hooks.description: Remind users that AgentBound monitoring is available for this session.

action.message: 💡 Kelan AgentBound is installed. Run `kelan bound --once` to audit this agent session, or ask me to start monitoring.

hooks.description: Flag writes to sensitive system paths so the user can verify intent.

action.message: ⚠️  AgentBound: write to sensitive path detected — this event will be flagged in the audit log if `kelan bound` is running.
